scripts.build: pnpm build:status && pnpm build:library && pnpm build:manager
scripts.build:library: cd services/library && go build ./... && pnpm --filter '@realtime-me/library-*' --if-present build
scripts.check: pnpm check:style && pnpm check:proto && pnpm check:status && pnpm check:library && pnpm check:manager
scripts.check:library: cd services/library && go vet ./... && go build ./... && cd ../.. && pnpm --filter '@realtime-me/library-*' --if-present typecheck
scripts.check:status: cd services/status && go vet ./... && go build ./... && cd ../.. && pnpm --filter @realtime-me/status-web check
scripts.check:style: biome check apps/web packages/library-web packages/web-ui services/manager tools
scripts.format: biome format --write apps/web packages/library-web packages/web-ui services/manager tools && buf format -w
scripts.generate: buf generate --template buf.gen.go.yaml --path proto/realtime/me/status --path proto/realtime/me/site --path proto/realtime/me/library && buf generate --template buf.gen.status.yaml --path proto/realtime/me/status --path proto/realtime/me/site && buf generate --template buf.gen.library.yaml --path proto/realtime/me/library && buf generate --template buf.gen.manager.yaml --path proto/realtime/me/manager && node tools/normalize-generated.mjs
